textByHash.008dfe12b92bc1c98a0ce95431399b3e0259cfce: Minus the wilderness level from your combat level to find the lowest level that you can attack, then add the wilderness level to your combat level to find the highest level that you can attack.
textByHash.01888eb816ecb64f6c87122b81bb7b81afdf99d3: Well I am glad you asked. The accurate style will give you experience points in your Attack skill, you will also find you will deal damage more frequently as a result of being, well, more accurate.
textByHash.07cef21506dd6349184bd10879b36f8d60e41709: In recognition of your defensive abilities, when you have it equipped it will act as ring of life, saving you from combat if your hitpoints become low.
textByHash.17d28ea2db3b10ed15db1e7400ce12f9d3a7019a: Finally, we have the controlled style. This style will give you the same amount of experience as the other styles would but shared across all three of the combat skills.
textByHash.183fcca714f4d5f4c7364ef77a3aea02a82a2524: You'll no longer receive a starter pack after respawn. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHash.2033b00a2d9581b4a10aa9a8a0f526c2eb6c980d: You might also find that different weapon types are more accurate against different monsters.
textByHash.22bf27705bfc042864575d8ecd808f93f27941f3: Ah, but I can see you're already a master in the fine art of Defence. Perhaps you have come to me to purchase a Skillcape of Defence, and thus join the elite few who have mastered this exacting skill?
textByHash.235a98513341b008bf0a541d1176d6d8f7780c0a: Well adventurer, the first thing you will need is a sword and a shield appropriate for your level.
textByHash.26761012155b886731cd4cc20498ff433d68ed63: There are four different melee styles. Accurate, aggressive, defensive and controlled. Not all weapons will have all four styles though.
textByHash.2750dd3b06c14d3efbdadeacceeecc0df3e370c6: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.
textByHash.318e749a0b634eb9a6406614b4afc36d0bbef8ee: Next we have the aggressive style. This style will give you experience points in your Strength skill. When using this style you will notice that your attacks will hit a little harder.
textByHash.40d6e05c43cf158ab7ca733b873ed2c429c2581b: The Cape of Defence will act as ring of life, saving you from combat if your hitpoints become low.
textByHash.43c8fa1203dcda53c18217f6c71c92e86c8be41d: Sure thing, I can give this to another adventurer who is in need of training.
textByHash.4a871c5f9e9306c3d6a665b947b288133f07d436: You already have a training sword and shield. Save some for the other adventurers.
textByHash.4c92c01fdc3a7c486914687e771f9e387545eef3: You can find which player can attack you by checking your combat level.
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.528cf10cfe85e32d5bda81484d986298c515bf2c: Well adventurer, there are a few places you might be able to do this.
textByHash.5871fe9bbc15bf8aaf72e05bd99b1017a621a7f0: Both activities are safe minigame, which means if you die you will not loose any of your items. You can get to them by using the teleport option in your minigames tab.
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.5d011c58390dcaa535a647a63422d5cb31394216: There is also the wilderness. The wilderness is north of Varrock and you can fight other players there. But bare in mind if you die to another player in the wilderness you will lose your stuff.
textByHash.6f7d86e4c6a3f596e5460cc0b1ec2418b273ad60: Yes, I can help with that.
textByHash.7290bd749817a815fdc1ed5993608c885bef69d2: Now for the defensive style, this style will give you experience points in your Defensive skill. When using this style you will notice that you get hit less often.
textByHash.81478501fc174352853cc2d32f926027263ac6c9: Ho there Zanik! You look like a strong fighter!
textByHash.846930d05347f0c5226c05d022b73ad41b836819: Each type uses one of the attack styles. Stab uses accurate, lunge and slash use aggressive and block uses defensive.
textByHash.857d867117e784ba2aed2eb7d4982e7d6994cdb0: While I tried all of them for a while, I settled on this rather good sword.
textByHash.88523306abe3f16ad460dedccd00bfd6dca5a3d9: You could try your luck at castle wars. Here, two teams fight each other to defend their respective flags. To win the game you will need to get the other team's flag and return it to your flag stand.
textByHash.972fb374787d798e2a8d5c65bcd88008359948c1: You wish to join the elite defenders of this world? I'm afraid such things do not come cheaply - in fact they cost 99000 coins, to be precise!
textByHash.9bbd903dcf39bdb4df0b4e39efa4cba66d14908b: Of course. Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.
textByHash.9ef5365c3ab0219a6230d99c0b487fc85dbee0ff: There you go, use it well.
textByHash.a070c2317c14b56010a5ab1f130c5540602eb254: Here you go. One starter pack. Enjoy.
textByHash.a364e942c7d25d3fe024057a65ab7c161651e143: If you are in a clan, you should gather some clan members and try out clan wars. There you can see which clan is better than the other by fighting each other in an arena.
textByHash.ae4d146129e6c88da84b53accc577358c963f4db: Greetings adventurer, I am the Melee combat tutor. Is there anything I can do for you?
textByHash.b6c0420f5c5fa4d315ad8d2fb05245550678b65f: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
textByHash.bc3a2cb95e8b6cb21665086a659eb48d03de1843: To find out which style an attack type uses, hover your mouse cursor over the style button.
textByHash.be379f28a9e0c2efbf2bd4bc6d5dd6cdeb2d4978: Make sure to equip your sword and shield. Click on them in your inventory, they will disappear from your inventory and move to your worn items. You can see your worn items in the worn items tab here.
textByHash.ca08f2fde9245ffdac6d91300bf9b370479439f3: Only go into the wilderness with items you are willing to lose and pay attention to the wilderness level you are in. The higher the level you go, more player will be able to attack you.
textByHash.cba0f8f2587a927bd58913fff703f49714dbb1c7: But this also means that if you kill another player you will be able to take their stuff too.
textByHash.d17690f6ead80f9b857b0c6d095c3faba4c5c0c2: Well let me see now...There are stabbing type weapons such as daggers, then you have swords which are slashing, maces that have great crushing abilities, battle axes which are powerful.
textByHash.d99a014a9f810db7116c228bb3a293f8c700aefe: You don't need any more help, then. How about you?
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.e54e9378dd74785d4275614f50b9ec07d0c7cf16: If you were using the training sword for example, there are four different attack types. Stab, lunge, slash and block.
textByHash.e6dd872507ca9a602ea025af95b9d62db332ab7b: I have no use for that, sorry.
textByHash.e975e2c29923143d337c15edd0e7e78edcf8aa05: When you are wielding your sword you will then be able to see the correct options in the combat interface.
textByHash.ebca59307f84f16c0e6ca54b5736cb48a00672e7: If you need some more advice, you should talk to Adventurer Jon about Adventure paths. He may even have a handy starter kit you can use.
textByHash.f16a6455b0a39109edd80e6fb312e5baf75a44a3: It depends a lot on how you want to fight. Experiment and find out what is best for you. Never be scared to try out a new weapon; you never know, you might like it!
textByHash.f7825bc280cfc4da41b81005709c51930aabd952: Is there anything else you would like to know?
